name: Chinese Green Bean Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can cream of celery soup (10.75 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a greased 2-quart casserole dish, combine the green beans, bean sprouts, and soup.
2. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
3. Sprinkle with onion rings; bake an additional 5 minutes, or until the onion rings are golden brown.
